---
title: "Cell: 2025_03_12"
author: "Sofiia Kobryna"
date: 2026.07.20
format: html
toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    code-fold: true
---
## About

This is .qmd 

```{r}

#install.packages("readABF")
library(readABF)
library(tidyverse)

```
## Cell

Lets import our file
```{r import_file}

example_file <-
  readABF("../data/2025_03_12/2025_03_12_0006.abf")

#make data tidy

as.data.frame(example_file, sweep = 1)

extract_sweep <- function(sweep_n, abf) {
  abf %>% 
    as.data.frame(sweep = sweep_n) %>%
    mutate(sweep = sweep_n)
}

extract_sweep(sweep_n = 1, abf = example_file)

sweep_dfs <- map(1:length(example_file$data), extract_sweep, abf = example_file)

example_df <- bind_rows(sweep_dfs)

abf_to_df <- function(abf){
  map(1:length(abf$data), extract_sweep, abf = abf) |>
    bind_rows()
}

abf_to_df(example_file)

```
## Import all data for the cell

```{r real_import}

files <- list.files("../data/2025_03_12", pattern = ".abf", full.names = TRUE)

abfs <- map(files, readABF)

dfs <- map(abfs, abf_to_df)

files |> str_sub(-9,-5)
names(dfs) <- files |> str_sub(-9,-5)

example_df |> rename(
  time_s = `Time [s]`, 
  current_pA = any_of(c("Currnt0Pr [pA]", "Volt0Pr [pA]"))
)

dfs <- map(
  dfs, 
  rename, time_s = `Time [s]`, 
  current_pA = any_of(c("Currnt0Pr [pA]", "Volt0Pr [pA]"))
  )

dfs <- map(dfs, select, time_s, current_pA, sweep)
all_sweeps <- bind_rows(dfs, .id = "file")

```


```{r}
```


```{r}
```


```{r}
```


```{r}
```


```{r}
```



## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 1
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).
